caption: A man with a white beard, wearing a white kurta, an orange vest, and a colorful saffron, white, and green stole, speaks at a podium. He is positioned in front of a white backdrop repeating a lotus logo. To his right, a group of men sit in a row, several wearing red caps and orange scarves. The scene is framed by orange graphics at the top and bottom. The top section contains the text "भारतीय जनता पार्टी स्थापना दिवस" alongside lotus logos and the words "प्रजाजनमेत्री" and "दिल्ली". The bottom section includes the text "लाइव देखें", social media handles "@BJP4India", and the website "www.bjp.org/bjplive". Across the frames, the speaker's hand gestures change as he addresses the crowd, while the seated men remain mostly still, looking toward him. The background and on-screen text remain constant throughout the sequence.
